basic_details.job_title: BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited (BVFCL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Company Secretary Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for PSU jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 48 years for Dy. Manager (CS) and 45 years for Asstt. Manager (CS)
age_limit.details: Company Secretary (Dy. Manager): Maximum age 48 years. Company Secretary (Asstt. Manager): Maximum age 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate and Associate Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
qualification.details: Company Secretary: Qualifications: Graduate and Associate Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Experience: Minimum 8 years (for Dy. Manager) and minimum 5 years (for Asstt. Manager) as company secretary in a PSU / large private sector organization with proven in-line knowledge of latest Company law and Corporate Governance compliances including Secretarial standards. Good grasp of applicable laws to a company so as to report to BoD periodically.

salary_details.details: For Dy. Manager (CS): Rs. 24900-3%-50500 (Approx. annual CTC Rs. 13.7 lacs) For Asstt. Manager (CS): Rs. 20600-3%-46500 (Approx. annual CTC Rs. 11.3 lacs)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BVFCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BVFCL Company Secretary Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BVFCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BVFCL Company Secretary Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Company Secretary: Qualifications: Graduate and Associate Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Experience: Minimum 8 years (for Dy. Manager) and minimum 5 years (for Asstt. Manager) as company secretary in a PSU / large private sector organization with proven in-line knowledge of latest Company law and Corporate Governance compliances including Secretarial standards. Good grasp of applicable laws to a company so as to report to BoD periodically.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Company Secretary (Dy. Manager): Maximum age 48 years. Company Secretary (Asstt. Manager): Maximum age 45 years.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Dy. Manager (CS): Rs. 24900-3%-50500 (Approx. annual CTC Rs. 13.7 lacs) For Asstt. Manager (CS): Rs. 20600-3%-46500 (Approx. annual CTC Rs. 11.3 lacs)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BVFCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications for the BVFCL Company Secretary post is 25 July 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their applications well before the deadline to avoid any technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Company Secretary in BVFCL?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Company Secretary post in Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited. This recruitment is for a Fixed Term Contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BVFCL Company Secretary posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website of BVFCL, www.bvfcl.com, within the specified application period.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 48 years for Dy. Manager (CS) and 45 years for Asstt. Manager (CS). The cut-off date for age calculation is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Company Secretary?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate and an Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). Relevant experience in a PSU or large private sector organization is also required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Company Secretary post at BVFCL?
faq.answer: The salary for Dy. Manager (CS) is Rs. 24900-3%-50500 with an approx. annual CTC of Rs. 13.7 lacs. For Asstt. Manager (CS), it is Rs. 20600-3%-46500 with an approx. annual CTC of Rs. 11.3 lacs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for BVFCL Company Secretary Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to UR, OBC, and EWS categories are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 200/-. Please refer to the official notification for details on payment methods and any exemptions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Company Secretary post includes shortlisting of applications, followed by document verification, and a final interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the BVFCL Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Company Secretary position is Namrup, Assam. Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited is located in this region, offering opportunities in the PSU sector.

faq.question: Q10. When does the online registration for BVFCL Company Secretary begin?
faq.answer: The online registration for submission of applications for the BVFCL Company Secretary post starts from 26 June 2026. Interested candidates can access the application link on the official website from 10:00 hours on that date.
